# EHDS Explorer

> A comprehensive, open-access platform for exploring the European Health Data Space (EHDS) Regulation (EU) 2025/327, with structured navigation, plain-language explanations, cross-regulation mapping, country implementation tracking, and interactive learning tools.

## About

EHDS Explorer helps citizens, healthcare professionals, health-tech companies, researchers, and policymakers understand and navigate the EHDS Regulation. It provides the full text of the regulation with structured chapter/section navigation, plain-language explanations, a multi-source definitions glossary, official EU FAQs, cross-regulation references, country-level implementation tracking, an implementing acts tracker, and a suite of learning and collaboration tools. All public content is free and open-access.

## Core Content

- **Articles**: full regulation text organised across chapters and sections, covering primary use, secondary use, governance, the EHDS infrastructure (MyHealth@EU, HealthData@EU), enforcement, and more
- **Recitals**: interpretive context for the regulation
- **Definitions**: multi-source glossary of defined terms, drawn from the EHDS Regulation, the European EHR Exchange Format, Xt-EHR, and implementing acts, with source references
- **Annexes**: technical annexes on EHR categories, data categories, and related requirements
- **Implementing & Delegated Acts**: tracker covering lifecycle status, feedback/consultation periods (with automatic status transitions when deadlines pass), themes, and full text where available
- **Official EHDS FAQs**: European Commission FAQs with version tracking
- **Topics & Glossary Index**: rights and obligations mapped to specific articles and recitals
- **Cross-Regulation References**: mapping to GDPR, MDR/IVDR, AI Act, Data Governance Act, Data Act, NIS2, and other related EU law

## Key Features

- Full-text and fuzzy search across all content
- AI-powered assistant for regulation questions (FAQ-first, role-aware)
- Plain-language translations of complex legal text
- Country-level implementation tracking and legislation status across EU/EEA Member States, with an interactive country map
- Member State implementation tracker covering key obligations with supporting evidence
- Health authority directory
- Cross-regulation map and content/knowledge-graph visualisations
- Stakeholder-tailored experiences (citizens, healthcare professionals, health-tech companies) and scenario finder
- Compliance tools hub (readiness assessment, starter-kit wizard)
- Study mode (sequential reading, flashcards, quizzes) and learning games (quiz, flashcards, match, word search, true/false, who am I?)
- Kids Corner with AI-generated comics and a simplified mode
- Country leaderboard and achievements/gamification
- Collaboration tools: workspaces/teams, bookmarks, annotations, notes, inline highlighting, and shareable deep links
- News & updates with weekly AI-generated summaries
- Email subscriptions and act alerts
- Multilingual support across many EU languages
- Public, FAIR-compliant data API (JSON-LD, ELI/EUR-Lex references)
- Accessibility controls (WCAG 2.1) and light/dark mode
- Installable progressive web app (PWA) with offline support; native iOS/Android apps

## Primary Audiences

- EU/EEA citizens and patients wanting to understand their health data rights
- Healthcare professionals adapting workflows to EHDS requirements
- Health-tech companies and manufacturers assessing compliance obligations
- Researchers, data holders, and health data access bodies working on secondary use
- Policymakers and Member State authorities transposing and implementing the regulation

## Important Disclaimers

- This platform is an educational and informational tool, not a source of legal advice
- Always refer to the Official Journal of the European Union for the authoritative regulation text
- Content is updated as implementing acts, official FAQs, and national transposition measures are adopted

## Contact

For questions or feedback, use the in-app feedback tools or visit the Help Center at https://ehdsexplorer.eu/help
